articles.title: Man fleeing immigration officers in Florida is struck and killed by tractor trailer, police say
articles.description:
The 28-year-old was among four occupants of a vehicle that stopped in the parking lot of a gas station and convenience store in St. Augustine before 7 a.m.

The post Man fleeing immigration officers in Florida is struck and killed by tractor trailer, police say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 28-year-old man was killed by a tractor trailer in St. Augustine, Florida.
The incident occurred around 7 a.m. involving four occupants in the vehicle.
Boston residents should be aware of increased scrutiny on immigration enforcement.

articles.title: Here’s what meteorologists are saying about the yellow skies across the region
articles.description:
"Expect a fiery sunset tonight & more smoke in the coming days."

The post Here’s what meteorologists are saying about the yellow skies across the region appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Meteorologists predict a fiery sunset for Boston residents tonight due to smoke.
Increased smoke levels expected in the coming days, affecting air quality.
Residents should prepare for potential respiratory issues from the smoke.
